name: aggregator
description: Broad Market: Scans 910k+ jobs from the open aggregator.

name: local
description: Direct Source: Scans your curated company list via direct API (Supports Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workable, BambooHR, SmartRecruiters).

name: remotive
description: Remote tech jobs (Free Tier: 20 most recent jobs).

name: remoteok
description: Remote tech jobs from RemoteOK's public API.

name: hackernews
description: Monthly hiring threads from Hacker News. Tech/startup focused.

name: arbeitnow
description: European tech jobs from Arbeitnow's public API. Attribution: arbeitnow.com.

name: weworkremotely
description: Remote jobs from We Work Remotely's public RSS feed. Attribution: weworkremotely.com.

name: adzuna
description: Official Adzuna API source. Requires ADZUNA_APP_ID and ADZUNA_APP_KEY.

name: himalayas
description: Remote jobs from Himalayas' public API.

name: jobicy
description: Remote jobs aggregator with EU coverage from Jobicy's public API.
